creator: lioux@FreeBSD.org
text:
portuguese/aspell does not relate to the general pt l10n
code but to the specific pt_PT. Therefore, it should be named
portuguese/aspell-pt_PT following the convention.

	Repocopy

portuguese/aspell 

to

portuguese/aspell-pt_PT

	The repocopied port will then be modified with the attached
patch. Furthermore, an appropriate entry will be added to ports/MOVED.
